name: Google Chat Channel
description: Google Chat Pub/Sub ingress and message delivery for Pawrrtal.

env.name: GOOGLE_CHAT_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE
env.label: Google Chat Service Account File
env.description: Path to the Google Cloud service account JSON used for Chat and Pub/Sub.

env.name: GOOGLE_CHAT_PROJECT_ID
env.label: Google Chat Project ID
env.description: Google Cloud project that owns the Pub/Sub resources.

env.name: GOOGLE_CHAT_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
env.label: Google Chat Subscription ID
env.description: Pub/Sub pull subscription that receives inbound Google Chat events.

env.name: GOOGLE_CHAT_DEV_ADMIN_ID
env.label: Google Chat Dev Admin ID
env.description: Optional sender resource name that auto-links to the seeded dev admin.

capabilities.title: Google Chat
capabilities.description: Receives Google Chat events and sends formatted Pawrrtal responses.
